payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. No memory cards were deleted or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user and does not contain a durable user memory to store.

details: Admin SQL command was not executed.
No memory_cards were deleted or changed.

repair_options: If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported user-level memory commands.
Contact an administrator for authorized administrative operations.
